blocker: intended proposer claude-haiku-4-5 (all Anthropic models) unreachable: 400 credit balance too low; substituted reachable cross-provider proposers via HUD gateway + Fireworks
one_line: Proposer model MATTERS a lot for harness synthesis: same Thompson search/data/seed, only proposer varied -> minimax-m3 best (0.897 heldout acc, 0 false-blocks, near hand-written baseline), gpt-5.5 over-blocks (10 heldout false-blocks), deepseek-v4-pro produced an EMPTY rule-set (no harness, 13 heldout false-allows)
